rationale: Educ. Code §37.103 governs school district rule enforcement authority. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap exists.
quote: This subchapter is not intended to restrict the authority of each district to adopt and enforce appropriate rules for the orderly conduct of the district in carrying out its purposes and objectives or the right of separate jurisdiction relating to the conduct of its students and personnel.
_note: No conflict. §37.103 concerns student/personnel conduct rule enforcement; proposed change concerns property tax appraisal exemptions. Disjoint subject matter.
